title: Better Ominous Bottles
description: Makes Ominous Bottles with 5th level of Bad Omen distinguishable from other ones
body:
This resourcepack makes Ominous Bottles with 5th level of Bad Omen stand out from the rest by having... a little more **ominous** look. Additionally, all Ominous Bottles are now emissive!
Make sure to install all the mods listed in the dependencies.

![two slightly different ominous bottles with the text saying "better ominous bottles" on top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c64115f5c1321cd3b182c78d58bc2b7057e5f5e.png)
